content.en:
"The fog area is divided into the outer area, the inner area and the core area, we are now in the outer area, under normal circumstances, we are even a little difficult to identify the direction in the outer area, and we don't even know how big the fog area is, how to distinguish the outer area from the inner area, in fact, it is because there is a clear dividing line between the outer area and the inner area!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"The dividing line?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he really didn't know this, although he tried to understand the misty area, there were some things that he couldn't understand all.

"Not bad!"

Yun Lan dominated: "If you want to enter the inner area of the Misty Region, you need to pass through a misty river, and there are a large number of misty beasts in the misty river, if you can't reach the strength of the Tianzun realm, it is easy to fall into the misty river." As for the internal area, I don't know much about the core area, and it can even be said that there are very few people in the Chaos Sea who know this secret, because even the Supreme doesn't dare to rush into the core area. But I've heard of a secret, the core area is the territory of terrifying mist beasts, the weakest of which are comparable to the supreme, and the most powerful mist beast lord is not even an opponent of the first god lord of the god race!"

Listening to Yun Lan's narration, Ye Tian learned more about the misty area.

Although the Kunwu Supreme of the Terran Race had also entered the Misty Zone, it was a long time ago, and he had only entered the Misty Zone once before leaving.

At that time, the Kunwu Supreme had only been in the outer areas of the Misty Region for a while.

Therefore, Kungo Supreme doesn't know much about the misty region.

"Lord of the Heavens, are you going to enter the inner area?"

Lord Yunlan asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Although there are many good things in the outer area, most of the treasures are relatively ordinary and of little use to him, and he wants to obtain some treasures that can help him a lot.

He even wanted to break into the core area if it was even possible.

Suddenly.

Lord Yunlan bent down and said, "Lord Fatian, I want to enter the inner area, but I know that my strength is very weak, even in the outer area, the possibility of falling is very high. I know it's too much to ask for the Fa Celestial Lord to take us into the inner zone, but I can only ask you for help now. I know a location with a large number of top-grade elixirs, my father and I once entered there, it was a valley, but there were many misty beasts there, and my father's strength in the fourth rank of Tianzun was also injured. The location is relatively remote, and the old members who followed my father have basically fallen, so no one should know about it. If the Fa Heavenly Lord takes us there, I will only ask for a few elixirs. "

"Oh, is there any elixir there that is worth your desperate efforts to take?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is a Nine-Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass there, which can transform a Quasi-level cultivation talent into a mixed-level cultivation talent!"

Yunlan Juggernaut did not hide it.

"Really?"

Ye Tian was also moved.

Although he didn't need a treasure to improve his cultivation talent, and his family didn't need it much, the human race needed it!

It is impossible for him to expose the ability to deprive the Replication Talent of the bestowed, but if there is the Nine-Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, it is enough for the human race to give birth to some more supremes!

Moreover, the value of the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass is also very high, even if it is traded out, it is enough to exchange for a large amount of wealth.

"Yes, but I can't be sure how many Nine-Colored Sky Crystal Grass there are. Besides, we didn't go deep into that valley, and I can't tell if there is a Nine-Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass comparable to the Supreme in it!"

Yunlan dominates the truth.

"Okay, I'll take you there! If it succeeds, I'll only take eighty percent of the elixir treasures!"

Ye Tian promised.

"Thank you, Lord Fa Tian!"

Yunlan Juggernaut said excitedly.

The rest of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group was also a little excited, what did they venture into the Mist Region for?

If there is a big harvest, you don't have to come in again for the next 100,000 years and millions of years.

This time, with a strong person like Ye Tian with them, although they are still in danger, they have enough protection.

Although they couldn't get a top-grade elixir treasure like the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, they also had the hope of obtaining other elixir treasures!

All in all, this is a rare opportunity!

"Let's go!"

Ye Tiandao.

Wow!!!!

A group of people rushed towards the inner area of the Misty Zone.

Along the way, whenever there were misty beasts rushing over, Ye Tian directly shot to kill them.

Therefore, the people of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group did not encounter any danger at all, just like walking in a garden.

But everyone knew very well that all this was because of Ye Tian, if there was no Ye Tian, they dared to fly to the inner area so quickly, it would be simply looking for death!

A few days later.

The misty river that separated the outer area and the inner area appeared, and there were countless misty beasts in the misty river, roaring one by one, shaking the entire misty river.

"There is a strange rule power in the sky above the Misty River, it can't fly at high altitude, it can only fly at low altitude, and the rules of space are forbidden here, and you can't do it if you want to shuttle through!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"Let's just fly over there!"

Ye Tiandao.

Everyone in the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group flew over together, and they opened the defensive formation, but they were still very nervous in their hearts.

Bang!!!!

A large number of misty beasts appeared, about a thousand, and the speed was too fast, even faster than the Juggernaut, enough to be comparable to the speed of the Heavenly Venerable.

Moreover, there are a few Heavenly Venerable-level misty beasts among them, even if the fifth-rank Heavenly Venerable comes here, unless the treasures are exhausted, there is no hope of breaking through.

"It's not good, how can a Tianzun-level misty beast appear this time!"

Yunlan was shocked.

She had followed her father to it once, and there were no Tianzun-level misty beasts at that time, and the strongest was only the ultimate master, and her father spent a little effort to cross the misty river.

But this time it seems to be a little unlucky!

"Don't worry!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Lord Yunlan glanced at Ye Tian, and then breathed a sigh of relief.

"Town!"

Ye Tianyi pointed out, and the void froze.

Rumble!!!!!

Under the squeeze of the void, a large number of mist beasts were crushed into blood mist, and those few Tianzun-level mist beasts were also pinched and exploded by Ye Tian, turning into corpses and falling towards the misty river.

Under Ye Tian's action, everyone crossed the misty river without danger.

"It's so strong!"

Yunlan Juggernaut secretly commented.

Before, Ye Tian easily defeated the Blood Wolf Tianzun, but the speed was too fast, and they didn't have an intuitive embodiment at all, but now Ye Tian casually killed a large number of misty beasts, which completely reflected his strength.

"The Fa Tian Juggernaut has such strength with the cultivation of the Master, could it be that he is a top-level Supreme-level Highness secretly cultivated by a certain universe clan?"

Yun Lan dominates speculation.

But even the top supreme-level highness may not have such strength.

"Or is the Fa Heavenly Lord the son of one of the forces of the Twelve Universe Eras?"

Yunlan Juggernaut thought again.

"Master Yunlan, you lead the way next!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Good!"

Lord Yunlan nodded, and then through a series of methods to identify the location, it took a long time to confirm the location of the valley.

"Over there!"

Lord Yunlan pointed in one direction.
